reviews.comment:
El lugar de estacionamiento reservado para seguros estaba ocupado por autos que sus ocupantes estaban viendo el mundial en YPF SERVICLUB. El precio del bidón de auxilio  $110,00 es muy caro sobre todo por la pésima calidad y lo poco práctico al usarlo, imposible no derramar combustible al usarlo.
Hoy 02/01/2019 Me pasó lo mismo, un sólo cliente en seguros y sin lugar para estacionar en dársena.18 de enero de 2020 ingresé 12:50 a la gomeria pero arriba no me atendieron porque eran 12:55 y atienden hasta las 13:00...vagos!
No renuevan registro de conductor en esta filial.
1/12/2022. Cafe abierto, asqueroso

(Translated by Google)
The parking space reserved for insurance claims was occupied by cars whose occupants were watching the World Cup at YPF SERVICLUB. The price of the spare tire can, $110.00, is very expensive, especially considering the poor quality and how impractical it is to use; it's impossible not to spill fuel when using it.

Today, January 2, 2019, the same thing happened to me: only one insurance customer and no parking available in the designated area. On January 18, 2020, I went to the tire shop at 12:50 PM, but they wouldn't serve me upstairs because it was 12:55 PM and they close at 1:00 PM...lazy!
They don't renew driver's licenses at this branch.
December 1, 2022: The cafe was open, disgusting.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcU9XenZBRRAB

Excellent service. But you have to keep an eye on the guys at the drying area because they work quickly and don't pay attention to detail.

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente el lavado es pésimo y caro, la limpieza interior no existe, dejan todo mojado, con un aspirado bién rápido. El exterior si tenés marcas de bichos por un viaje, vas a tener que gastar en un segundo lavado, porque no sólo que la máquina no lo limpia, sino que quienes deberían terminar el trabajo a mano no ponen el más mínimo de atención. Una lástima siendo socio del Aca desde hace años recibir este servicio pésimo. Domingo 11 de diembre 17:30 hs.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, the car wash is terrible and expensive. The interior cleaning is nonexistent; they leave everything wet, with a very quick vacuum. If the exterior has bug marks from a trip, you'll have to spend money on a second wash, because not only does the machine not clean it, but the people who should be finishing the job manually don't pay the slightest attention. It's a shame to be an Aca member for years and receive such terrible service. Sunday, December 11, 5:30 p.m.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtbC1lWDl3RRAB
